title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, May 17 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 17/05/2022
Image reference: 2022-05-17_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-may-17-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Mid-age Capesize values have firmed. CapesizeMineral Yarden (181,200 DWT, May 2016, Imabari) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 50.75 mil, VV Value USD 50.58 mil. Panamax BTG Olympos and BTG Kailash (81,100 DWT, Oct/Feb 2015, Japan Marine United) sold to TMS Dry for USD 71.20 mil, VV Value USD 63.96 mil - En Bloc.
